dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Hello! Are you the new neighbor?
dialogue.translation: Hej! Er du den nye nabo?

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Yes, I am. My name is Tom.
dialogue.translation: Ja, det er jeg. Jeg hedder Tom.

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you, Tom. I'm Anna.
dialogue.translation: Dejligt at møde dig, Tom. Jeg er Anna.
dialogue.note: Høfligt svar og præsentation af sig selv.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Nice to meet you too. Do you live here with your family?
dialogue.translation: I lige måde. Bor du her med din familie?

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Yes, I live with my husband and my daughter.
dialogue.translation: Ja, jeg bor med min mand og min datter.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: That's great. I work at the hospital. What about you?
dialogue.translation: Det er fantastisk. Jeg arbejder på hospitalet. Hvad med dig?

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: I study English at the university.
dialogue.translation: Jeg studerer engelsk på universitetet.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Wonderful! Well, I have to go now. See you later!
dialogue.translation: Vidunderligt! Nå, jeg må gå nu. Vi ses senere!

dialogue.speaker: Anna
dialogue.text: Goodbye, Tom.
dialogue.translation: Farvel, Tom.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: Good morning. What do you want to eat?
dialogue.translation: God morgen. Hvad vil du spise?
dialogue.note: Hilsen og indledende spørgsmål fra tjeneren.

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: I'd like a sandwich, please.
dialogue.translation: Jeg vil gerne have en sandwich, tak.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: Do you want cheese or ham?
dialogue.translation: Vil du have ost eller skinke?
dialogue.note: Spørgsmål for at vælge type sandwich.

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: Ham, please. And I want a glass of orange juice.
dialogue.translation: Skinke, tak. Og jeg vil have et glas appelsinjuice.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: Anything else? Coffee or tea?
dialogue.translation: Noget andet? Kaffe eller te?

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: Yes, I'd like a cup of coffee with milk.
dialogue.translation: Ja, jeg vil gerne have en kop kaffe med mælk.

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: That's a sandwich, orange juice and coffee. Is that correct?
dialogue.translation: Det er en sandwich, appelsinjuice og kaffe. Er det korrekt?

dialogue.speaker: Client
dialogue.text: Yes, perfect. How much is it?
dialogue.translation: Ja, perfekt. Hvor meget koster det?

dialogue.speaker: Waiter
dialogue.text: It's 9 dollars. You can pay at the counter.
dialogue.translation: Det koster 9 dollars. Du kan betale i kassen.

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: It's raining outside. What do you want to do today?
dialogue.translation: Det regner udenfor. Hvad vil du gøre i dag?
dialogue.note: Kommentar om vejret og spørgsmål om planer.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: I want to watch a movie in the living room.
dialogue.translation: Jeg vil se en film i stuen.

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: Good idea. And I want to read my new book.
dialogue.translation: God idé. Og jeg vil læse min nye bog.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: Can I have some hot chocolate?
dialogue.translation: Kan jeg få noget varm chokolade?

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: Yes, I can prepare it for you.
dialogue.translation: Ja, jeg kan lave det til dig.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: And later, can I play with my toys?
dialogue.translation: Og senere, kan jeg lege med mine legetøj?

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.text: Sure. But first, let's clean the bedroom together.
dialogue.translation: Selvfølgelig. Men først, lad os gøre soveværelset rent sammen.

dialogue.speaker: Daughter
dialogue.text: OK, Mom. After that, maybe I take a nap.
dialogue.translation: Okay, mor. Bagefter tager jeg måske en lur.

title: Buying a T-shirt at the store

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: Hello. Can I help you?
dialogue.translation: Hej. Kan jeg hjælpe dig?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: Yes, I want to buy a T-shirt.
dialogue.translation: Ja, jeg vil købe en T-shirt.

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: What color do you like?
dialogue.translation: Hvilken farve kan du lide?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: I like blue and black. Do you have a blue one?
dialogue.translation: Jeg kan lide blå og sort. Har I en blå?

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: Yes, we do. What size do you need?
dialogue.translation: Ja, det har vi. Hvilken størrelse har du brug for?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: I think I need a large size. Can I try it on?
dialogue.translation: Jeg tror, jeg har brug for en large. Kan jeg prøve den?

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: Of course. The fitting room is over there.
dialogue.translation: Selvfølgelig. Prøverummet er derovre.

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: It fits perfectly! I like it very much. How much does it cost?
dialogue.translation: Den passer perfekt! Jeg kan rigtig godt lide den. Hvor meget koster den?
dialogue.note: Positiv kommentar og spørgsmål om pris.

dialogue.speaker: Salesperson
dialogue.text: It costs 25 dollars. Do you want to take it?
dialogue.translation: Den koster 25 dollars. Vil du tage den?

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll take it.
dialogue.translation: Ja, jeg tager den.

title: Asking for directions to the bank

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Excuse me. I need to go to the bank. Where is it?
dialogue.translation: Undskyld mig. Jeg har brug for at gå til banken. Hvor ligger den?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: The bank is near the park. Go straight down this street.
dialogue.translation: Banken ligger nær parken. Gå lige ud ad denne gade.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: OK, go straight. Then?
dialogue.translation: OK, gå ligeud. Så?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: Walk for two blocks and turn right at the cinema.
dialogue.translation: Gå to blokke og drej til højre ved biografen.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Turn right at the cinema. Is it far?
dialogue.translation: Drej til højre ved biografen. Er det langt?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: No, it's not far. Cross the street and you'll see the bank in front of you.
dialogue.translation: Nej, det er ikke langt. Kryds gaden, og du vil se banken foran dig.
dialogue.note: Præcisering om afstand og sidste instruktion.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Great. And is there a bus stop near there?
dialogue.translation: Fantastisk. Og er der et busstoppested i nærheden?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: Yes, there is a bus stop next to the bank. You can take bus number 5.
dialogue.translation: Ja, der er et busstoppested ved siden af banken. Du kan tage bus nummer 5.

dialogue.speaker: Tourist
dialogue.text: Thank you very much for your help.
dialogue.translation: Mange tak for din hjælp.

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: You're welcome.
dialogue.translation: Selv tak.

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: Look! This is a photo of my family.
dialogue.translation: Se! Dette er et billede af min familie.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: Wow! Who is the man next to you?
dialogue.translation: Wow! Hvem er manden ved siden af dig?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: That is my father. He is tall and has brown hair.
dialogue.translation: Det er min far. Han er høj og har brunt hår.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: And the woman with the glasses?
dialogue.translation: Og kvinden med briller?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: That's my mother. She is a teacher. She is wearing a blue dress.
dialogue.translation: Det er min mor. Hun er lærer. Hun har en blå kjole på.
dialogue.note: Beskrivelse af moderen og hendes erhverv.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: They look very happy. Is that your brother?
dialogue.translation: De ser meget glade ud. Er det din bror?
dialogue.note: Kommentar og spørgsmål om en anden person.

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: Yes, he is my brother. He is sitting on the sofa. He is 10 years old.
dialogue.translation: Ja, det er min bror. Han sidder i sofaen. Han er 10 år gammel.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: And where are you in the photo?
dialogue.translation: Og hvor er du på billedet?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: I am standing behind my parents. I smile a lot!
dialogue.translation: Jeg står bag mine forældre. Jeg smiler meget!
dialogue.note: Beskrivelse af sin position og attitude.

dialogue.speaker: Peter
dialogue.text: You have a nice family. Do you all live together?
dialogue.translation: Du har en dejlig familie. Bor I alle sammen?

dialogue.speaker: Lucy
dialogue.text: Yes, we live in a big house near the beach. I love them.
dialogue.translation: Ja, vi bor i et stort hus nær stranden. Jeg elsker dem.
dialogue.note: Yderligere information og udtryk for kærlighed.
